sanskrit: यथैधांसि समिद्धोऽग्निर्भस्मसात्कुरुतेऽर्जुन । ज्ञानाग्निः सर्वकर्माणि भस्मसात्कुरुते तथा ॥
hindiTranslation: हे अर्जुन  जैसे प्रज्वलित अग्नि ईंधनोंको सर्वथा भस्म कर देती है, ऐसे ही ज्ञानरूपी अग्नि सम्पूर्ण कर्मोंको सर्वथा भस्म कर देती है ॥
englishTranslation: As a blazing fire reduces fuel to ashes, so the fire of knowledge reduces all actions to ashes, Arjuna.
essence: Real understanding burns the binding power of every action.
speaker: Krishna
simpleMeaning: Clear understanding destroys the binding force of past actions, just as fire destroys fuel.
simpleInsight: There is relief in seeing that insight can end what effort alone cannot.
detailedMeaning: On Kurukshetra, Arjuna still stands frozen while Krishna keeps teaching him how action can be transcended. After saying knowledge carries a person across all wrongdoing, Krishna now gives the image: true understanding burns the force of karma completely.
modernRelevance: You replay a mistake at 2 a.m., convinced it has branded you forever. Then one honest insight breaks the spell and the story stops running you.
translationLiteral: यथा (just as) / एधांसि (fuel) / समिद्धः (blazing) / अग्निः (fire) / भस्मसात् (to ashes) / कुरुते (makes) / अर्जुन (Arjuna) / ज्ञान-अग्निः (fire of knowledge) / सर्व-कर्माणि (all actions) / भस्मसात् (to ashes) / कुरुते (makes) / तथा (so)
